business.name: Bloom Aesthetics Clinic
business.hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM

services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles. Results last 3-6 months.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Injectable fillers to restore volume and contour. Results last 6-18 months.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: Free initial consultation with our aesthetic practitioners to discuss your goals and treatment options.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for cancellations or rescheduling.
